title: taraxacum inops
intro: Taraxacum inops, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a plant species in the dandelion genus that is characterized by its smaller size and fewer flowers compared to the common dandelion. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum inops include its ability to act as a diuretic and its potential to reduce inflammation, making it useful for treating digestive issues and urinary problems. The health benefits of consuming Taraxacum inops include its ability to support liver function, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant properties. Taraxacum inops can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with the leaves and roots being used for medicinal purposes.
